evidence_label: mitapivat clinician conversation sequence gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Supports starting with clinical category, transfusion decision context, patient blood management, and transfusion-burden questions before advanced-option review.
Supports asking iron, liver, cardiac, chelation, and organ-risk questions before disease-modifying drug discussion.
Adult-label, hepatocellular-injury, REMS, hepatic-impairment, and interaction boundary for mitapivat discussion.
Pediatric TDT watchlist record; API check showed not-yet-recruiting, no posted results, last update 2026-04-08, version 2026-05-20.
Pediatric NTDT watchlist record; API check showed not-yet-recruiting, no posted results, last update 2026-04-08, version 2026-05-20.
Adult TDT benchmark record; API check showed active-not-recruiting, posted results, last update 2026-04-24, version 2026-05-20.

conversation_sequence.question_intent: State that the visit asks for label validation and missing-record routing, not treatment change.

Ask whether the current public-safe labels for diagnosis category, transfusion dependence, transfusion burden, immune/transfusion, iron/organ, and referral readiness are correct, wrong, or unconfirmable.
Ask which missing records should be requested first and which owner should provide them.
Ask whether the seven mitapivat domains are privately label-ready and release-checked.
Ask only whether mitapivat is clinically worth reviewing at all, or whether the lane should stay paused.
Reduce any clinician answer to the May 18 action ladder before public documentation.

decision_rule: The mitapivat review-readiness question is step five, not step one. Stop at the first missing, corrected, or release-blocked prerequisite and record only public-safe labels.
